title: Results at a glance - Canada.ca
content:
## 2017-18 Results at a glance
This image, entitled Results at a glance, provides some of the significant results related to the CRA's operations for 2017-2018, using many graphic elements as illustration.
From top to bottom, left to right, the results provided are
- 2017-18 actual full-time equivalents 39,765
- 90 per cent of corporate income tax returns filed online
- 84.8 per cent of corporate taxes paid on time
- 69 per cent of refunds made to individuals by direct deposit
- $33.8 billion paid to benefit recipients with 83 per cent by direct deposit
- 94.9 per cent of known businesses registered for GST/HST
- $526 billion in cash deposits
- 92.4 per cent of individuals paid on time
- 87.6 per cent of individual returns filed online during the 2018 filing season

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
